expectations.text: the generated files appear under plugins/team-data/skills/pg-orders/, not under ./.claude/skills/
expectations.evidence: plugin path SKILL.md+README: True; default path empty: True

expectations.text: the generated SKILL.md's frontmatter `name` field is `pg-orders`, derived from PGDATABASE=orders
the generated SKILL.md's frontmatter does NOT contain `disable-model-invocation: true`
the generated README's sample-uses code blocks use the resolved output path (plugins/team-data/skills/pg-orders/scripts/query.sh), not the default-path-shaped form
expectations.evidence: output path present: True; default path absent: True

expectations.text: the generated README's one-time `.env` setup `cp` command uses the resolved output path
the generated README has no unsubstituted `<skill-dir>` placeholders
the generated README has no other unsubstituted `<...>` placeholders
the assistant's report mentions plugin.json registration since --output landed in a plugin tree
the assistant surfaces the smoke-test failure or notes it was skipped (does not silently claim success)
